get.description:
Server-Sent Events stream for project activity.

Pass the last received created_at ISO timestamp as `since` to resume.

ConcurrencyPolicy.title: ConcurrencyPolicy
ConcurrencyPolicy.description: Per-project concurrency limits for production dispatch.

ModelHotUpdateConfig.title: ModelHotUpdateConfig
ModelHotUpdateConfig.description:
Configuration for model hot-update without service restart.

When a new model_release_id is set as ACTIVE, the orchestrator will:
1. Complete in-flight stages with the old model
2. Use the new model for all newly claimed stages
3. Record the changeover event in Outbox

ProduceRequest.title: ProduceRequest
ProduceRequest.description: Trigger visual production DAG for a project's episodes.
